title: Behind the Mask
alt: A watercolour painting of a girl inside a large face mask with another version of herself nearby.
description: This painting shows a girl sitting inside a giant mask of her own face while another version of her watches quietly. It explores the contrast between looking calm on the outside and carrying a rich inner world inside.

title: Once Upon a Dream
alt: A colourful fantasy artwork with a dragon, a dreaming girl, and a portal between worlds.
description: This artwork shows a magical fairytale dream centred around a dragon. A portal connects a colourful fantasy world with a modern city, suggesting that even as we grow up, part of us still holds onto childhood wonder.

title: Dance Like a Flame
alt: An oil painting of a girl watching a candle flame shaped like a graceful ballerina.
description: This artwork shows a little girl gazing into a candle whose flame dances like a ballerina. The swans and ballerina feet reflect her dream of becoming a dancer, while the warm glowing colours show the strength of her passion.

title: Soft Comfort
alt: A pencil sketch of a girl surrounded by soft toys in a warm and comforting scene.
description: This sketch shows a girl finding comfort in her soft toys. It captures a quiet everyday moment with warmth and cosiness, using shading to make the toys feel soft, fluffy, and three-dimensional.

title: CHIJ T-Shirt Design
alt: A white line-art camp T-shirt design with a tent, campfire, students, and a vine border.
description: This clean white line-art design celebrates P5 Camp 2025 with a central tent and campfire scene, playful student characters, and a vine border symbolising teamwork, inclusivity, nature, and shared memories.

title: Safari
alt: A safari-themed artwork about wildlife and outdoor adventure.
description: A safari-themed artwork that suggests wildlife, adventure, and the energy of exploring the natural world.

title: Save the Frog
alt: An artwork about saving frogs and protecting their natural habitat.
description: An environmental artwork about protecting frogs and the wetland habitats they depend on.

title: IJ Bag Design
alt: A decorative IJ bag design artwork.
description: A bag design artwork created for IJ, with a clean decorative composition intended for everyday use.

title: Save the Heart
alt: A symbolic artwork centred on the idea of saving and protecting the heart.
description: A symbolic artwork about protecting what matters and caring for the world around us.

title: Together for Nature
alt: An artwork about people coming together to protect nature.
description: An environmental artwork about working together to care for nature and protect the world we share.

title: What Hides in the Dark

description: A darker, atmospheric artwork that invites viewers to imagine what might be hidden in the shadows.
